name: Sentry Turret
description: Notes Part of the Kogbold Turretsmith Archer set.
effects: Gun Turret: This turret rapidly fires towards enemies. Flail Turret: Creates 4 spinning flails around the spawn point. Heavy Turret: This turret fires 3 larger, heavier bullets in a cone.
Shots hit multiple targets Shots pass through obstaclesWith Experimental Cannon equipped: Every 3rd shot inflicts Slowed for 0.2s
Shots hit multiple targets Shots pass through obstacles
With Tinkerers Apron equipped: Inflicts Slowed for 0.2s
Shots pass through obstaclesWithTargeting Monocular equipped: Every other shot inflicts Slowed for 0.2 seconds
